title: papaver argemone subsp. minus
intro: Papaver argemone subsp. minus, also known as lesser poppy or Argemone minus, is a species of poppy that belongs to the family Papaveraceae. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds, such as alkaloids and flavonoids, that exhibit analgesic and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits associated with Papaver argemone subsp. minus include relief from pain, inflammation, and infections, as well as improved wound healing and reduced fever. The herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used in traditional medicine to address various health concerns.
